assertions.title: Amount input and quote

steps.action: Open swap tab and enter 10 in 'You pay' amount input
steps.expected: Estimated output and USD equivalents update as user types
steps.observed: Amount input accepted '10', but 'You receive' remained 0 and no visible quote update.
API returned HTTP 429 RATE_LIMITED for /market, /trades, and /candles during test window.

evidence.consoleErrors: agent-browser errors: none (no uncaught JS errors). Browser console showed repeated network 429 responses.

assertions.issues: Cannot validate quote behavior under sustained API rate limiting; prerequisite quote data path unavailable.

assertions.title: Swap CTA button states

steps.observed: CTA displayed 'Connect Wallet' in swap widget.

steps.expected: Connect and verify connected CTA states ('Enter an amount'/'Swap'/'Insufficient balance')
steps.observed: Wallet modal opened, but available Aptos wallets were install-only and Google path redirected to external Google sign-in requiring credentials not provided in isolation context.

evidence.network: Connect flow redirected to accounts.google.com OAuth page

assertions.issues: Connected CTA states are untestable without a provisioned wallet or auth credentials in this isolated run.

assertions.title: Swap execution with toast

steps.action: Attempt to reach connected swap state
steps.expected: Wallet connects and Swap button becomes actionable
steps.observed: Could not establish connected wallet session (wallet extension absent, OAuth requires external credentials).

steps.expected: Click Swap and observe success/error toast
steps.observed: Swap execution path unreachable because app remained disconnected.

evidence.network: OAuth redirect attempted; no signed swap transaction submitted

assertions.issues: Requires connected/signing-capable wallet not available in assigned environment.

assertions.title: Limit order form

steps.expected: Price + amount inputs and buy/sell selector are available
steps.observed: Limit tab rendered with buy/sell toggle and two inputs; values entered (price 1.25, amount 5) and side switched to sell.
CTA remained wallet-connect gated; submission path blocked without connected wallet.

evidence.network: No place-order transaction request observed; form remained auth-gated

assertions.issues: Form UI is present, but order submission cannot be validated without wallet connection.

assertions.title: Connect wallet and see balances

steps.observed: Wallet modal opened with Google/Apple options and Aptos wallet install links.

steps.expected: Navbar shows connected address, swap shows balances, CTA changes from Connect Wallet to Swap
steps.observed: Connection could not be completed in isolation: Aptos wallets were not installed and Google path required external account login.

evidence.network: OAuth redirect to accounts.google.com observed; no return to connected app state

assertions.issues: No test credentials/provisioned wallet in boundary, so balance-visible connected state is untestable.

assertions.title: Real-time price updates

steps.expected: Header price updates on incoming trade and flashes green/red; chart receives new point
steps.observed: Displayed values remained unchanged before/after wait ($0.000000, $0.00); no visible flash/update observed.

steps.expected: Data services available for realtime pipeline
steps.observed: API endpoints were rate-limited (429), and console continuously logged failed resource loads (429).

evidence.consoleErrors: agent-browser errors: none (no uncaught JS errors); console showed repeated HTTP 429 resource errors
evidence.network: curl /market, /trades, /candles all returned 429 during the same test window

assertions.issues: Realtime behavior could not be validated with backend data path under sustained rate limiting and no observable incoming trade updates.

assertions.title: Wallet disconnect returns to connect state

steps.observed: Unable to complete wallet connection in isolated run (no installed Aptos wallet, OAuth requires external credentials).

steps.expected: Swap CTA and navbar return to disconnected 'Connect Wallet' state; balances disappear
steps.observed: Disconnect flow unreachable because connected precondition was not met.

assertions.issues: Cannot validate disconnect behavior without a connected wallet session.

frictions.description: Choosing 'Continue with Google' for wallet connect navigates away to Google OAuth in the same tab, requiring manual return to app URL for further testing.
frictions.resolution: Reopened http://localhost:3102 in the same isolated agent-browser session after each OAuth redirect.

frictions.description: Console was saturated with repeated HTTP 429 errors from local API during UI interactions.
frictions.resolution: Retried requests and waited; 429 persisted during this validation window.

blockers.description: No provisioned connectable wallet within isolation boundary (Aptos wallets shown as install-only; OAuth connect requires external credentials).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal, attempted Google connect path, confirmed redirect to external login requirement; retried flow and returned to app.

blockers.description: Local API endpoints were persistently rate-limited (HTTP 429), preventing reliable quote/realtime verification.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried /market, /trades, and /candles requests and waited 30s; responses remained 429 with retryAfter hints.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 7 blocked due wallet-auth prerequisites and sustained API 429 rate limiting during the validation window.
